name: Capistrano Unified School District
districtFact: Capistrano Unified School District publishes school-year calendar PDFs with first and last days, teacher pre-service days, elementary and middle minimum days, back-to-school night windows, recesses, holidays, semester dates, quarter dates, progress reporting dates, and graduation timing.

about.title: About Capistrano Unified School District
about.content: Capistrano Unified School District, also known as CUSD, is a public school district serving families across south Orange County, California. The district calendar is used by students, parents, and educators to track instructional days, school holidays, fall recess, winter recess, spring recess, minimum days, parent conference windows, semester dates, quarter dates, progress reporting periods, and the last day of school. Because CUSD includes multiple schools and grade levels, campus events, activities, athletics, bell schedules, and graduation details may be announced separately from the districtwide calendar.

about.title: How to Use This CUSD Calendar
about.content: Use this page for districtwide school-year planning. Families should still confirm school-specific bell schedules, back-to-school night assignments, athletics, graduation details, transportation notices, and campus events through Capistrano Unified and their assigned school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for CUSD Families
content: Mark the opening day minimum schedule because elementary and middle school students have minimum days on the first student day.
Back-to-school night windows are set by level, but the exact minimum day can vary by individual school site.
Elementary parent conference weeks include minimum days, so confirm dismissal times with your school.
High school final exam windows include minimum days before the semester and school-year close.

customSections.label: Capistrano Unified Calendar Planning Notes
customSections.content: CUSD calendars include several schedule details beyond the major breaks. The PDFs call out all-teacher pre-service days, elementary and middle minimum days, secondary professional development days, elementary conference windows, high school final exam minimum days, and separate tentative dates for the Alternative to Suspension Program calendar.

customSections.label: CUSD Schools and Grade Levels
customSections.content: Capistrano Unified School District serves students across multiple grade levels, including elementary, middle, and high school programs. This page summarizes the districtwide academic calendar, while individual CUSD campuses may publish additional schedules for school events, activities, athletics, performances, graduation details, and school-specific programs.

compareIntro: Compare the Capistrano Unified (CUSD) calendar with Irvine Unified (IUSD), Santa Ana Unified (SAUSD), and Garden Grove Unified (GGUSD) calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and major breaks. This comparison is provided for planning purposes. Families should use each district's official calendar as the final source for schedule changes because neighboring Orange County districts may follow different instructional schedules, recess windows, minimum-day rules, and campus event calendars.

districtFaqs.q: Which Capistrano Unified calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the official Capistrano Unified School District school-year calendar PDFs for the listed years.

districtFaqs.q: Does CUSD list minimum days on the district calendar?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. The CUSD calendar marks minimum days for elementary, middle, high school final exams, parent conference windows, and the last day of school.

districtFaqs.q: Are Capistrano Unified back-to-school night dates the same at every campus?
districtFaqs.a: Not always. The district lists date windows by school level and notes that minimum days may follow each individual school site calendar.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify Capistrano Unified calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official CUSD calendars page and campus announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with Capistrano Unified School District.
